scenarios.description: child(0) on element with only non-Element child nodes throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (childNodeSize()>0, filtered list empty branch)

scenarios.description: child(1) uses cached shadowChildrenRef on second invocation without rebuilding list (shadowChildrenRef branch)

pseudocode: TEST TC06 child uses cached shadow list
